title: SwipeLayout intercepts horizontal scroll from a nested view inside a RecyclerView
body: When a SwipeLayout row contains a horizontally-scrollable child (e.g. an inner RecyclerView or ViewPager), touch events meant for the child's horizontal scroll get intercepted as a swipe-open gesture instead, making the nested scroller unusable.

title: Add DiffUtil support to the swipe adapters
body: BaseSwipeAdapter#notifyDatasetChanged just forwards to notifyDataSetChanged(), which forces a full rebind and can reset any currently-open swipe state. Could RecyclerSwipeAdapter expose a DiffUtil-friendly notify path that preserves open/closed state for unaffected rows?

title: Combining DragEdge.Left/Right with Top/Bottom behaves inconsistently
body: mDragEdges is a LinkedHashMap keyed by DragEdge, and swipe priority when multiple edges are configured on one SwipeLayout seems to depend on insertion order rather than a documented precedence rule -- registering Left then Top gives different behavior than Top then Left.

title: How does SwipeItemMangerImpl track open/close state across recycled positions?
body: I'm seeing rows randomly appear pre-opened after a fast fling in a ListView using ArraySwipeAdapter. Is SwipeItemMangerImpl expected to close all other open items on bind, or is that left to the adapter subclass to implement manually?
